prompt: search for junior software developer jobs in Israel across all the Israeli job boards. yoad just graduated and has no preference on tech stack

assertions.text: WebSearch queries target at least 2 different Israeli job board sites
At least one search query contains Hebrew characters
Results include source attribution for each job listing
Output includes at least 3 distinct job listings with titles
When WebFetch returns 403, the skill falls back to WebSearch with site: filter
